steps: 使用 Go 重新安装
添加 HashiCorp 仓库并安装
commands: wget -O- https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | gpg --dearmor | sudo tee /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg; echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.gpg] https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com $(lsb_release -cs) main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/hashicorp.list; sudo apt update && sudo apt install terraform

steps: 添加 HashiCorp 仓库并安装
commands: sudo dnf install -y dnf-plugins-core; sudo dnf config-manager --add-repo https://rpm.releases.hashicorp.com/RHEL/hashicorp.repo; sudo dnf install terraform
